sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n55509" key="katafqinu/qw" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">καταφθῐνύθω</orth> [<foreign lang="greek" TEIform="foreign">ῠ],</foreign> <sense id="n55509.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <xr opt="n" TEIform="xr"> <lbl opt="n" TEIform="lbl">=</lbl> <ref targOrder="U" lang="greek" TEIform="ref">καταφθίω</ref></xr>, <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0013.tlg002.perseus-grc1:353" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <title_ TEIform="title">h.Cer.</title_> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">353</biblScope></bibl>, <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg1342.tlg001:111:4" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Emp.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">111.4</biblScope> </bibl>; cf. sq.</sense> </entryFree>
